# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
  labels:
    app: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-microservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nodejs-container
        image: your-nodejs-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
        env:
        - name: MONGODB_URI
          value: mongodb://mongodb-service:27017/your-database
        - name: NODE_ENV
          value: production
      restartPolicy: Always

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nodejs-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 3000
    targetPort: 3000
  selector:
    app: nodejs-microservice

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: mongodb-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: mongodb-container
        image: mongo:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 27017
      restartPolicy: Always

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 27017
    targetPort: 27017
  selector:
    app: mongodb
